languages.text: "Я ничего не знаю об этой Милости Паутины..."
"But I know nothing about the Grace of the Web..."
languages.original_text: "Я ничего не знаю об этой Милости Паутины..."

traits.locale_text: "But I don't know anything about Keah'shini..."
"But I don't know anything about Keah'shini..."
"But I know nothing about the Grace of the Web..."
"But I know nothing about the Grace of the Web..."

languages.text: «Pero no sé nada de la Gracia de la Red...».
languages.original_text: "But I know nothing about the Grace of the Web..."

traits.locale_text: «Pero no sé nada de la Gracia de la Red...».

languages.text: 「だが、{mf|俺|私}はウェブの恩寵については何も知らないのだが…」
languages.original_text: "But I know nothing about the Grace of the Web..."

traits.locale_text: 「だが、{mf|俺|私}はウェブの恩寵については何も知らないのだが…」

languages.text: “但我对织血罗网的恩典一无所知……”
languages.original_text: "But I know nothing about the Grace of the Web..."

traits.locale_text: “但我对织血罗网的恩典一无所知……”

languages.text: "Aber ich weiß nichts über die Anmut des Netzes ..."
languages.original_text: "But I know nothing about the Grace of the Web..."

traits.locale_text: "Aber ich weiß nichts über die Anmut des Netzes ..."

languages.text: « Mais je ne connais rien à la Grâce de la Toile... »
languages.original_text: "But I know nothing about the Grace of the Web..."

traits.locale_text: « Mais je ne connais rien à la Grâce de la Toile... »

languages.text: "Ama ben Ağ'ın Lütfu hakkında hiçbir şey bilmiyorum..."
languages.original_text: "But I know nothing about the Grace of the Web..."

traits.locale_text: "Ama ben Ağ'ın Lütfu hakkında hiçbir şey bilmiyorum..."
